name: farm-price-note
description: 농산물 가격 추이와 지역별 비교 서비스

scripts.build:with-ai: npm run update:data && npm run generate:ai-report && npm run validate:data && npm run build
scripts.qa:check: npm run quality:check && npm run ui-copy:check && npm run selector:check && npm run data:check && npm run interaction:check && npm run render:check
scripts.verify:deps: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['node_modules/.bin/vite','node_modules/@vitejs/plugin-react']) { if (!fs.existsSync(p)) { console.error('missing '+p); process.exit(1); } } console.log('vite dependency ready')"
scripts.deploy:check: npm run verify:deps && npm run actions:check && npm run collection:check && npm run gemini:check && npm run data:check && npm run validate:data && npm run quality:check && npm run runtime-ui:check && npm run interaction:check && npm run render:check && npm run typecheck && npm run build
